subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In the meadowland of this world there are roses and sweet herbs in abundance, and jasmine and basil beyond count; yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در چمنستان جهان گل و ریاحین بسیار و یاسمین و ضیمران بیشمار لکن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @high station of the true believer
